params.name: Penglai Jade Branch
params.description:
On Jan 10, 660 AD, a new branch sprouted from the tree, and the prince of a faraway kingdom commenced his journey in search of the jade branch.
The Penglai Jade Branch comes from a sacred tree on the mountain of the East Sea, with silver roots, a golden trunk, and jade fruits. Legend has it that an aristocrat commissioned the branch to win over his love, and the craftsmen created a branch that appeared to be from Fairyland. However, when the aristocrat couldn't pay the craftsman in time, the …
